docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BISKUP, TAD , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES, 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BISKUP, TAD , AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 328 SERRANO DRIVE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. CA 94132, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77124591)
